nasb.text: Then Shallum the son of Jabesh conspired against him and struck him before the people and killed him, and reigned in his place.

esv.text: Shallum the son of Jabesh conspired against him and struck him down at Ibleam and put him to death and reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 雅比的兒子沙龍陰謀反叛他，在人民面前把他殺死，接續他作王。

ccb.text: 雅比的儿子沙龙谋反，当众杀了撒迦利雅，篡位做了以色列王。
